_readme: SHARED engine↔JS parity vector. FROZEN CONTRACT. test_reformat_determinism.py (Python, services.canonical_hash via main.canonical_output_hash) and src/lib/__tests__/cc-reformat-determinism-parity.test.js (JS, canonicalDeliveryOutputHash) BOTH hash `cues`+`seg_qc` and MUST get `expected_canonical_output_hash` byte-for-byte. This is acceptance point 1: proof the two hashers agree on a known payload, not merely that their projections 'look equivalent'. To change: update the Python authority, re-run pytest (it re-emits + asserts), update this file, and confirm both suites green.
